title: Kumaari Lyrics Anniyan
stanzas: <div>Kumaari Oh Sukumari Song Lyrics Anniyan

Oh senjaane thone
 thaane nenaano..
ava thumbakathaanu
ambi lambaano

oh sukumaari
oh singaari
ye azhangaari ne
oh sukumaari ...

oh sukumaari
oh singaari
ye kumari nee
ye kumari nee.
kumaari.....

Kumari ...
en kadhal sikki mukki
thikki vikkudhu
Kumari ...
en nenju vimmi vimmi
pammi nikkudhu
kumari ..
en vaarthai kadai
vattri vittadhe..

naan thotrupoven
endru anjiye
en thaervai ellaam
oththi vaikkiren

vegumari sukumari
en manam oru malar adi
malarukku adithadi..

Kumari ...
en kadhal sikki mukki
thikki vikkudhu
Kumari ...
en nenju vimmi vimmi
pammi nikkudhu
kumari ..
en vaarthai kadai
vattri vittadhe..

Oh indhal kadhal enna
perum baaramaa
idhu veru kaalam illaa
garpamaa

kadhalai maraithaal
ganam thaangaamal
ennuyir sethu pogum illaiyaa

kadhalai solli illai endru
maruthaal kadhale
sethu pogum illaiyaa

oru kadhal kaditham
edhuvum manathai
mulusaai solvadhu illai

nee kangal adaithaai
kadhal nulaiya innoru
vaasal illai....
kumari.....

Naan thaanam kaetkum
oru oomaiyaa..
dhinam theigirene
idhu thaevaiyaa

koodaigal engum
pookkalai nirappi
kovilai thaedi nadakindren

koodaiyai koduthu
kumbitu mudithu
korikkai vaikka marakkindren

andha kadavulai vidavum
periyan oruvan boomiyil
undaa ? evan ?

pen kangalai paarthu
kadhalai sollum dhairiyam
ullavan, avan avan..

Kumari ...
en kadhal sikki mukki
thikki vikkudhu
Kumari ...
en nenju vimmi vimmi
pammi nikkudhu
kumari ..
en vaarthai kadai
vattri vittadhe..

Kumaraa ...
un kadhal sikki mukki
thikki vikkudhaa
Kumaraa ...
un nenju vimmi vimmi
pammi nikkudhaa
kumaraa ..
un vaarthai kadai
vattri vittadhaa.

naan thotrupoven
endru anjiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kumaari?

The song Kumaari is a romantic melody that expresses love and admiration.

Who composed the music for Anniyan?

The music for Anniyan was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

What role does the song play in the movie Anniyan?

In Anniyan, the song Kumaari highlights the romantic feelings of the protagonist.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kumaari?

The lyrics for Kumaari were penned by Vairamuthu.

When was the movie Anniyan released?

The movie Anniyan was released in the year 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kumaari from the movie Anniyan is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and admiration. Sung by Shankar Mahadevan, the song's lyrics by Vairamuthu convey deep emotions of longing and affection. AR Rahman's composition adds an enchanting musical layer, making it a memorable piece in the film. The song plays a significant role in highlighting the protagonist's romantic feelings, adding depth to the movie's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kumaari from the movie Anniyan, where Shankar Mahadevan's soulful voice meets AR Rahman's mesmerizing composition. This romantic track, penned by Vairamuthu, beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the world of Anniyan and let the music transport you to a realm of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Oh, did I think of you? She is like a flower, Ambi is like a lamb.
Oh beautiful girl, oh charming girl, you are so lovely, oh beautiful girl...
Oh beautiful girl, oh charming girl, you are the girl, you are the girl. Beautiful girl...
Beautiful girl... my love is tangled and confused. Beautiful girl... my heart is pounding and restless. Beautiful girl... my words have run out.
I am scared of losing, so I am holding back my feelings.
Fast girl, beautiful girl, my heart is like a flower, dancing like a flower.
Beautiful girl... my love is tangled and confused. Beautiful girl... my heart is pounding and restless. Beautiful girl... my words have run out.
Oh, is this love a heavy burden? Is this a timeless pregnancy?
If I hide my love, won't the weight be unbearable and my life end?
If I confess my love and it is rejected, won't love itself die?
A love letter cannot fully express the heart.
You closed your eyes, there is no other way to the thread of love.
Beautiful girl...
Am I a mute asking for charity? I am breaking down every day, is this necessary?
Everywhere flowers fill the baskets, I walk searching for the temple.
I give the basket, bow my head, and forget to make a wish.
Is there anyone greater than God on this earth? Who?
The one who has the courage to confess love by looking into a girl's eyes, he is the one.
Beautiful girl... my love is tangled and confused. Beautiful girl... my heart is pounding and restless. Beautiful girl... my words have run out.
Boy... is your love tangled and confused? Boy... is your heart pounding and restless? Boy... have your words run out?
I am scared of losing, so I am holding back my feelings.
Fast girl, beautiful girl, my heart is like a flower, dancing like a flower.
Oh, did I think of you? She is like a flower, Ambi is like a lamb.
